name: Pegu Club

spec.method_detail: Shake with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: From the Pegu Club in Rangoon, Burma (now Myanmar), which served British officers during colonial times. The drink gained fame after Harry Craddock included it in the 'Savoy Cocktail Book' (1930). Audrey Saunders named her seminal NYC cocktail bar after this drink in 2005.
